title: gladiolus coccineus
intro: Gladiolus coccineus, also known as the Red Sword Lily, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Gladiolus coccineus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Gladiolus coccineus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
